projects.title: Lockey
projects.description: An AI-powered corporate travel concierge designed to streamline the entire travel lifecycle. It features a 2D mascot that guides travelers through planning, policy compliance, live disruptions (crisis management), and multimodal expense reporting.

workflow.title: System Architecture
workflow.diagram:
flowchart TD
  User[Traveler] --> Frontend[Next.js Frontend]
  Frontend --> Auth[NextAuth + Google OAuth]
  Frontend --> API[API Routes]
  API --> DB[(MongoDB Atlas)]
  API --> Gemini[Gemini 1.5 Pro]
  API --> TTS[ElevenLabs TTS]
  API --> Monitor[Disruption Monitor]

workflow.title: User Journey
workflow.diagram:
flowchart LR
  A[Sign In] --> B[Plan Trip]
  B --> C[Policy Check]
  C --> D{Compliant?}
  D -->|Yes| E[Book Trip]
  D -->|No| F[Suggest Alternative]
  F --> B
  E --> G[Expense Report]

projects.title: knkt
projects.description: A Bluetooth-powered mobile networking app built by students, for students. Uses AI-driven compatibility scoring to connect nearby university students with complementary skills. Transforms physical proximity into unanticipated, meaningful collaborations for startups, research, and side projects.

workflow.title: System Architecture
workflow.diagram:
flowchart TD
  App[Flutter App] --> BLE[Nearby Connections API]
  BLE <--> Peers[Nearby Devices]
  App --> Backend[FastAPI Backend]
  Backend --> DB[(MongoDB)]
  Backend --> AI[OpenRouter AI]
  Backend --> FCM[Firebase Messaging]
  AI --> Score[Compatibility Score]

workflow.title: Connection Flow
workflow.diagram:
sequenceDiagram
  participant A as Student A
  participant BLE as Bluetooth
  participant API as FastAPI
  participant B as Student B
  A->>BLE: Broadcast presence
  B->>BLE: Broadcast presence
  BLE->>A: Discover Student B
  A->>API: Request compatibility score
  API-->>A: Score and skills profile
  A->>API: Send connection request
  API->>B: Push notification
  B-->>A: Accept connection

projects.title: Sanos
projects.description: An automated debugging platform for Next.js applications. Monitors client-side crashes, server exceptions, and Vercel build failures in real time, then traces each error to the causal commit using AI-powered root cause analysis. Automatically opens reviewed pull requests with fixes, integrating with GitHub, Vercel, and CodeRabbit to close the developer debugging loop end-to-end.

workflow.title: Debug Pipeline
workflow.diagram:
flowchart TD
  App[Next.js App] --> Mon[Error Monitor]
  Mon -->|Client crash| Trace[Stack Trace Capture]
  Mon -->|Build failure| Hook[Vercel Webhook]
  Trace --> API[FastAPI Backend]
  Hook --> API
  API --> DB[(SQLite)]
  API --> Git[GitHub API]
  Git --> RCA[AI Root Cause Analysis]
  RCA --> CR[CodeRabbit Review]
  CR --> PR[Auto Pull Request]

workflow.title: Fix Loop
workflow.diagram:
sequenceDiagram
  participant App as Next.js App
  participant API as FastAPI
  participant GH as GitHub
  participant AI as Dedalus AI
  App->>API: Report crash and trace
  API->>GH: Fetch recent commits
  GH-->>API: Commit history
  API->>AI: Analyze root cause
  AI-->>API: Causal commit and fix
  API->>GH: Open PR with fix
  GH-->>App: PR ready for review

projects.title: Banana Coin
projects.description: A gamified high-frequency trading simulator built around a fictional cryptocurrency that "rots" in value when left idle. Features real-time price updates, an exponential rot mechanic that encourages active trading, and several unlockable AI-powered trading bots with prebuilt and custom natural-language strategies for automated workflows.

workflow.title: System Architecture
workflow.diagram:
flowchart TD
  Client[React Frontend] --> Auth[Firebase Auth]
  Client --> WS[WebSocket]
  WS --> API[FastAPI Backend]
  API --> Redis[(Redis Price State)]
  API --> Rot[Rot Engine]
  Rot -->|Price decay event| WS
  Client --> Bots[AI Trading Bots]
  Bots --> Strat[Strategy Engine]
  Strat --> API

projects.title: RootCode
projects.description: Developed a machine learning pipeline that predicts moisture content in maize populations in the Central Corn Belt region by filtering and cleaning 3,000+ features down to high-quality predictors, applying PCA to capture genetic and environmental patterns, and testing multiple ML algorithms for production use.

workflow.title: ML Pipeline
workflow.diagram:
flowchart LR
  Raw[3000+ Raw Features] --> Clean[Filter and Clean]
  Clean --> Scale[StandardScaler and RobustScaler]
  Scale --> Select[SelectKBest]
  Select --> PCA[PCA Reduction]
  PCA --> SVR[SVR]
  PCA --> Linear[Ridge and Lasso and ElasticNet]
  PCA --> Tree[RandomForest and GradientBoosting]
  SVR --> Best[Best Moisture Predictor]
  Linear --> Best
  Tree --> Best

projects.title: BeenDone
projects.description: A startup validation tool for founders that searches a vectorized database of 5,000+ YC-backed companies to deliver AI-powered competitive analysis before you write a single line of code. Features semantic vector search, feature radar charts, funding and stage distribution breakdowns, a geographic heat map of competitors, inline pivot suggestions, and downloadable venture fund proposal PDFs.

workflow.title: System Architecture
workflow.diagram:
flowchart TD
  Client[React Frontend] --> API[FastAPI Backend]
  API --> DB[(MongoDB Atlas)]
  API --> Embed[Sentence Transformers]
  Embed --> Search[Semantic Vector Search]
  Search --> Gemini[Google Gemini]
  Gemini --> Charts[Radar Charts]
  Gemini --> Map[Geographic Heatmap]
  Gemini --> PDF[Venture PDF Export]

workflow.title: User Flow
workflow.diagram:
flowchart LR
  A[Enter Startup Idea] --> B[Semantic Search]
  B --> C[Competitor Matches]
  C --> D[AI Analysis]
  D --> E[Radar Chart]
  D --> F[Heatmap]
  D --> G[Pivot Suggestions]
  E --> H[Export PDF]
  F --> H
  G --> H
